title: Car Lockout Service
shortDescription: Locked out of your car in Knoxville or surrounding areas? Tristar Locksmith provides professional, non-destructive vehicle entry, licensed, insured, and available 24/7.
longDescription: A car lockout can happen to anyone, anywhere, a parking lot in Farragut, a trailhead near Sevierville, or right in your own driveway in Knoxville. Tristar Locksmith dispatches a trained technician quickly so you're never stranded for long. We use professional, non-destructive entry tools to unlock your vehicle without damaging paint, seals, or window trim. Whether you drive a domestic sedan, a pickup truck, or a late-model import with advanced locking systems, our team has the experience and equipment to get you back in safely.
features: Licensed, insured technicians throughout Knox County
Non-destructive entry, no damage to your vehicle
All vehicle makes and models including imports and luxury cars
Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year
Upfront pricing with no hidden dispatch fees

faqs.question: Do you serve my area of Knoxville?
faqs.answer: Tristar Locksmith serves the full Knoxville metro area, including Farragut, Powell, and Oak Ridge, as well as more rural communities like Maynardville and Friendsville. Call (865) 381-3931 and we will confirm coverage for your location.

faqs.question: Will unlocking my car cause any damage?
faqs.answer: No. Our technicians use industry-standard slim-jim tools and air wedge systems designed for non-destructive entry. We never force locks or pry frames. Your vehicle will be in the same condition it was before you called us.

faqs.question: What if my keys are locked in the trunk?
faqs.answer: Keys locked in the trunk are very common and we handle them regularly. Depending on your vehicle, we can access the cabin through the door and use the interior trunk release, or in some cases work directly from the trunk lock itself. Either way, we'll get your keys out quickly.
